title: THE COMMISSIONER'S PROPOSAL
description: Following the confrontation at City Hall, Commissioner Marcus Hale requests a private meeting. He argues that political hesitation is allowing disorder to spread and asks for permanent emergency powers over demonstrations, surveillance and public gatherings.

choices.text: Grant Hale the permanent emergency powers.
choices.outcome: The commissioner promises absolute order. Civil-rights groups accuse your government of constructing a police state.

choices.text: Reject the proposal and establish independent police oversight.
choices.outcome: Hale leaves the meeting furious. Reform groups welcome the oversight commission, although senior officers call it political interference.

choices.text: Reject formal powers but permit an informal security arrangement.
choices.outcome: No official order is issued, but Hale understands that aggressive policing will not be closely questioned by your office.
